title: gh#80: Refactor error-handler tests: hoist logger.error spy setup to helper or beforeEach
whyTestsDoNotAlreadyCoverThis: Imported from GitHub issue. Preserve or add focused regression coverage when the issue acceptance criteria calls for it.
suggestedRegressionTest:
- `pnpm --filter @sms/api test` passes.
- The three tests touched by #77 (`logs request method and route ...`, `logs the route pattern, not concrete path params ...`, `logs <unrouted> when no route matched ...`) no longer each repeat the dynamic-import-and-spy block.
